hero.title: Projet éducatif
hero.subtitle: Nous accompagnons les enfants, les familles, les éducateurs et les communautés grâce à une approche intégrée qui unit pédagogie Montessori, art, nature et développement humain.

about.title: Éducation consciente et intégrée
about.description: Montessori All Around est un projet éducatif qui unit pédagogie Montessori, art, nature et développement humain pour accompagner les enfants, les familles, les éducateurs et les communautés.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: Contribuer à une culture éducative plus consciente, où enfants et adultes grandissent dans des environnements respectueux et inspirants.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Soutenir le développement intégral de l'enfant et guider les adultes dans leur rôle de guides de l'enfance.

nature.title: Nature
nature.description: Programmes qui connectent les enfants et les familles avec le monde naturel, favorisant les expériences en plein air.

art.title: Art
art.description: Photographie, peinture et sculpture comme partie essentielle du développement humain et éducatif.

about.quote: L'éducation est un processus naturel qui se développe spontanément dans l'être humain.

educator.name: Roberta Carreira
educator.title: Éducatrice Montessori Internationale et Leader Pédagogique

profile.title: Profil Professionnel
profile.bio1: Je suis une éducatrice Montessori internationale avec plus de 20 ans d'expérience dans l'éducation de la petite enfance, ayant travaillé au Portugal, en Chine, en Italie et aux États-Unis.
profile.bio2: Mon parcours comprend la direction et le développement d'environnements Montessori de haute qualité pour des enfants de 6 mois à 7 ans, toujours avec un fort accent sur l'autonomie, le développement émotionnel, la créativité et l'excellence éducative.
profile.bio3: Je combine la pédagogie Montessori avec ma formation en Beaux-Arts, Yoga pour enfants et une profonde connexion avec la nature, créant des expériences éducatives véritablement holistiques.

certifications.title: Formation et Certifications
items: Certification American Montessori Society (AMS/MACTE) - Seton Montessori Institute, Chicago
Orientation Montessori (AMI) - Nourrissons et Tout-petits - Lisbonne
Professeur de Yoga et Pleine Conscience pour Enfants - Yoga Maya Kids International
Licence en Beaux-Arts - Peinture, cum laude - Pérouse, Italie

expertise.title: Compétences
items: Éducation Montessori (Nourrissons, Tout-petits et Petite Enfance)
Éducation de la Petite Enfance et Leadership Pédagogique
Communication avec les Familles et Ateliers
Intégration de l'Art, du Yoga et du Mouvement
Apprentissage dans la Nature et Planification Curriculaire

international.title: Expérience Internationale
international.description: Y compris des écoles de référence comme Montessori School of Shanghai, The Little Oaks Montessori, Boundless Life et Nido Montessori Lisbonne.

methodology.title: Les Quatre Piliers
methodology.description: Notre approche intégrée unit quatre éléments fondamentaux pour créer des expériences éducatives transformatrices qui respectent l'être humain en développement.

montessori.title: Pédagogie Montessori
montessori.description: Approche éducative centrée sur l'enfant, respectant son rythme naturel de développement et son autonomie.

art.title: Art et Culture
art.description: Photographie, peinture et sculpture intégrées au processus éducatif comme expression du développement humain.

nature.title: Nature
nature.description: Expériences en plein air qui connectent les enfants et les familles avec le monde naturel à Lisbonne et Sintra.

community.title: Communauté
community.description: Construction d'un réseau éducatif qui unit familles, éducateurs et écoles autour de valeurs communes.

methodology.quote: L'enfant n'est pas un vase à remplir, mais une source à libérer.

services.title: Comment Nous Pouvons Aider
services.description: Nous offrons une variété de services pour accompagner les enfants, les familles, les éducateurs et les communautés sur le chemin Montessori.

familyConsulting.title: Conseil aux Familles
familyConsulting.description: Accompagnement personnalisé pour les parents et les aidants souhaitant mettre en œuvre l'approche Montessori à la maison.

babysitting.title: Garde d'Enfants Éducative
babysitting.description: Garde d'enfants basée sur les principes Montessori, respectant le rythme et les besoins de chaque enfant.

yoga.title: Yoga pour Enfants
yoga.description: Sessions de yoga adaptées aux enfants, favorisant le bien-être physique, émotionnel et la concentration.

nature.title: Programmes Nature
nature.description: Expériences éducatives en plein air qui connectent les enfants et les familles avec le monde naturel.

cultural.title: Expériences Culturelles
cultural.description: Programmes intégrant art, musique et culture dans le développement éducatif des enfants.

schoolConsulting.title: Conseil aux Écoles
schoolConsulting.description: Accompagnement dans la création et le développement d'écoles Montessori, de la conception à la mise en œuvre.

testimonials.title: Ce Que Disent les Familles
testimonials.description: Histoires vraies de familles qui confient leurs enfants à Roberta.

items.name: Laura Primerano
items.quote: Diana adore absolument Robi. Elle est toujours heureuse d'être avec elle et demande souvent de ses nouvelles le lendemain. Pour moi, cela en dit plus que tout le reste, surtout quand on vit à l'étranger et loin de sa propre famille.
items.fullContent:
I am very happy to recommend Roberta ("Robi") as a babysitter and caregiver.

Robi has been caring for my daughter, Diana, since 2023, when Diana was almost three years old. I first met her through a childcare agency, and from the very beginning we were extremely happy with her care and support, we immediately noticed how special she was.

Robi is warm, responsible, joyful, and incredibly attentive. She brings such a lovely energy into our home and has built a beautiful relationship with Diana, she is a family friend now!

Roberta always brings activities, arts and crafts, books, and always finds thoughtful ways to keep her engaged, happy, and interested, Diana learnt a lot from Roberta.

What stands out most to me is how well Robi truly understands Diana's personality and needs. She has always shown a very natural sensitivity in the way she relates to her, and she knows how to meet her with patience, care, and genuine attention. Robi adapts beautifully to Diana's age, stage of development, and emotional needs, and she has also always been very respectful of our family's routines, values, and culture.

She is also highly reliable in all the practical aspects of childcare. Robi can prepare meals, follow routines carefully, and support Diana in a calm and consistent way. On a few occasions when Diana was unwell, Robi also administered medicine responsibly and with great care, which gave us a great deal of peace of mind.

Another lovely part of Diana's time with Robi is that, on a few occasions, she also had the opportunity to spend time with Robi's children, Pedro and Lucy. Diana always had a wonderful time with them, whether going to the park together or playing at home, and those moments were always very positive and enjoyable for her.

Robi speaks English, Italian, and Portuguese, and she adapted very easily when we asked her to speak more Portuguese with Diana.

Most importantly, Diana absolutely adores Robi. She is always happy to be with her and often asks about her again the next day. For me, that says more than anything else, especially when you live abroad and far from your own family, we are really lucky we have found her.

We feel very privileged to have had Robi caring for Diana, and I recommend her with complete confidence to any family looking for someone kind, trustworthy, capable, and genuinely wonderful with children.

I guarantee any family would be very fortunate to have her.

items.name: Bazar Alina
items.quote: Nous avons constaté une augmentation très notable de l'indépendance d'Iva depuis qu'elle travaille avec Robi dans l'environnement Montessori. Iva va à l'école heureuse, rentre à la maison heureuse, et parle souvent de combien elle apprécie son temps avec Robi.
items.fullContent:
It is a pleasure to recommend Roberta ("Robi") as both a caregiver and educator.

Robi has been a wonderful support to our family over the past months, both at home and in the classroom. She has cared for our children, Iva and Daniil, and has become a truly valuable part of their daily lives.

Robi has a naturally warm, calm, and engaging way with children. She brings books, creative activities, and games, encouraging meaningful play, interaction, and learning, while thoughtfully reducing screen time. Our children genuinely enjoy being with her and always feel comfortable, happy, and well cared for in her presence.

She is equally reliable in the practical aspects of childcare, including preparing meals, carefully following routines, helping with school pick-ups and drop-offs, and, on several occasions, staying overnight in our home. We have always felt completely at ease trusting her with our children.

What stands out especially is the connection she has built with Iva. Since September 2025, Robi has also been teaching and guiding her in a Montessori classroom setting, which has given her a deep understanding of Iva's personality, needs, and development. We have seen how naturally and beautifully she supports her both at school and at home, always with genuine care, patience, and attention. Iva goes to school happy, comes home happy, and often talks about how much she enjoys her time with Robi.

We have also seen a very noticeable increase in Iva's independence since working with Robi in the Montessori environment. She has naturally developed essential everyday skills — tidying up after herself, putting on her shoes, washing her hands, maintaining personal hygiene, and even helping around the house. These habits appeared organically through Robi's approach and the environment she creates, as at home we had not been specifically focusing on this before. For us, this has been a very meaningful and valuable change.

We have also seen a very positive impact on Iva's learning and language development. She has been speaking more Portuguese, while also continuing to develop her English naturally and confidently. Robi has adapted beautifully to our wishes and supports Iva's growth with intelligence, sensitivity, and care, both in the classroom and at home.

Beyond all of this, we have truly grown very attached to Robi. She has become much more than a caregiver or teacher for our family. She brings a special warmth, energy, and sincerity into every interaction. Robi often sings with the children, and our daughter now knows many of these songs by heart — it creates a joyful, lively atmosphere around her. Learning with Robi always happens through play — naturally, lightly, and without pressure, yet with very real results.

On a few occasions, Robi also brought her own children, Pedro and Lucy, to spend time with ours, and the children always had a wonderful time together, whether at home or outdoors.

Robi brings a rare combination of warmth, trustworthiness, attentiveness, and professionalism, and we recommend her wholeheartedly to any family. She has been a true support to ours, and any family would be very lucky to have her.
